extraction.one_line_summary: SCHMID Mauro won from early break while BERNAL Egan attacked GC group on final gravel sector, gaining crucial seconds on all rivals except BUCHMANN Emanuel
tactical_patterns: BERNAL attacked immediately after learning EVENEPOEL isolated, exploiting team weakness not terrain difficulty to create psychological pressure
INEOS gave early break 15 minutes deliberately on gravel stage, prioritizing GC separation over stage control
BUCHMANN bridged solo to catch BERNAL group, revealing superior gravel handling among lightweight climbers
EVENEPOEL's anger at ALMEIDA not dropping back exposed Deceuninck's unclear hierarchy when Plan A fails

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: attacked immediately upon hearing rival isolated, showing opportunistic race intelligence beyond just physical strength
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: lost 2:08 when isolated, pulled earpiece in frustration at team, lacks self-sufficiency on technical terrain
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: bridged to BERNAL solo then limited losses to 3 seconds, exceptional gravel performance for pure climber
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: conceded 23 seconds to BERNAL despite staying in main group, cannot match Colombian's acceleration
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: lost 32 seconds to BERNAL while in same group, faded badly on final gravel climb
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: overcooked corner while pacing BERNAL on first sector, domestique role limits but positioning suggests trust
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: negative: dropped before second gravel sector, Italian experience on home roads didn't translate to survival
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: dropped before second gravel sector alongside FORMOLO, suggests team protected wrong rider
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped by BUCHMANN's acceleration with 5km remaining, age showing on technical finishes
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: negative: lost contact with main GC group before finish, cannot sustain pace on extended gravel
